page.title: {channel}'s Playlist
page.empty: This playlist is empty right now.

page.viewerToolsFailed: Viewer request tools failed to load.
page.requestsLiveOnly: You can add requests when the stream goes live.

states.updateRequestToggleFailed: Unable to update the request toggle right now.

search.title: Search to add a song
search.pathWarning: Doesn't match the channel default {count, plural, one {path} other {paths}}: {paths}.

favorites.title: Saved songs
favorites.descriptionOwner: Choose chart versions to save here. Viewers see the song on this list and can copy the request command or add it from here.
favorites.descriptionViewer: Songs {channel} has saved appear here. Use this list to request a song again or copy the command.
favorites.count: {count, plural, one {# saved song} other {# saved songs}}
favorites.saveFailed: Unable to update saved songs right now.

viewerSummary.vipBalanceSummary: {countText} VIP token{count, plural, one {} other {s}} available
viewerSummary.vipBalanceUnavailable: Your VIP token balance is unavailable right now.
viewerSummary.replaceQueued: New adds replace your queued requests.

badges.vipBalance: You have {countText} VIP token{count, plural, one {} other {s}}

vipInfo.manualOnly: This channel grants VIP tokens manually right now.

history.title: Played history
history.emptyFiltered: No played songs matched those filters.
history.empty: No songs have been marked played yet.

rules.searchMin: Type at least 2 characters to search.
rules.versionCount: {count, plural, one {# version} other {# versions}} - Song group {groupId}

community.title: Moderator controls
community.reconnectMessage: Reconnect Twitch to prioritize viewers currently in chat.

states.updateFailed: Unable to update channel community settings.

blocks.title: Blocked viewers
blocks.searchMin: Type at least 4 characters to search Twitch usernames.
blocks.description: Blocked viewers can still talk in Twitch chat, but they cannot add or edit requests from chat, the website, or the extension panel.
blocks.defaultReason: Blocked from making requests in this channel.

vip.title: VIP tokens
vip.searchPlaceholder: Search Twitch username to grant a token
vip.searchMin: Type at least 4 characters to search Twitch usernames.
vip.searchMinExisting: Existing VIP token holders appear below. Type at least 4 characters to search all Twitch usernames.
vip.viewOnly: You can view VIP balances, but only the broadcaster or an allowed moderator can change them.

viewerActions.alreadyVip: Already in your queue as a VIP request.
viewerActions.alreadyRegular: Already in your queue as a regular request.
viewerActions.alreadyActive: This song is already in your active requests.
viewerActions.activeLimitReached: You already have {count, plural, one {# active request} other {# active requests}}.
viewerActions.insufficientVipTokens: You do not have enough VIP tokens.

specialRequest.artistMin: Type at least 2 characters from an artist name.
specialRequest.randomHelp: Adds a random song from the matching songs for this artist.
specialRequest.favoriteHelp: Adds a random song from this channel's saved favorites.
specialRequest.choiceHelp: Adds a streamer choice request for this artist.

manageActions.searchMin: Type at least 2 characters to search current viewers.
manageActions.reconnectMessage: Reconnect Twitch to search viewers currently in chat.
manageActions.noMatches: No current viewers matched that username.

states.moderationUnavailable: Moderation actions are unavailable for this channel.

manual.title: Add a song
manual.searchMin: Search terms must be at least 3 characters.

actions.shuffleTooltip: Randomize the order of the queued songs.

shuffleDialog.title: Keep VIP requests at the top?
shuffleDialog.description: Yes keeps VIP requests ahead of regular requests while both groups shuffle internally.

actions.clearPlaylistTooltip: Removes every song from the playlist.

clearDialog.title: Clear playlist?
clearDialog.description: This removes every song from the playlist.

actions.resetSessionTooltip: Clears the playlist and turns requests off.
actions.resetSessionTooltipWithPickOrder: Clears the playlist, turns requests off, and resets pick order back to first pick.

resetDialog.title: End session?
resetDialog.description: This clears the playlist and turns requests off.
resetDialog.descriptionWithPickOrder: This clears the playlist, turns requests off, and resets pick order so the next request starts at first pick again.

disableDialog.title: Disable bot?
disableDialog.description: This turns the bot off for this channel. VIP token awards for raids, subscriptions, cheers, or tips will not run while the bot is disabled if those rewards are enabled.

groupedSongs.title: Grouped songs
groupedSongs.description: Review songs with multiple versions that requesters and streamers treat as the same song.
groupedSongs.count: {count, plural, one {# grouped song} other {# grouped songs}}

blacklistErrors.missingRequestVersionId: This request does not have a version ID to blacklist.
blacklistErrors.missingVersionVersionId: This version does not have a version ID to blacklist.
blacklistErrors.missingRequestSongGroupId: This request does not have a song group ID to blacklist.
blacklistErrors.missingRequestArtistId: This request does not have an artist ID to blacklist.
blacklistErrors.missingVersionCharterId: This version does not have a charter ID to blacklist.

management.blacklistPanelDescription: Artists, charters, songs, and specific versions can be blocked for this channel.

history.title: Played history
history.empty: Nothing has been marked played yet.

deleteDialog.title: Remove this request from the playlist?
deleteDialog.descriptionWithArtist: This removes "{title}" by {artist} from the playlist. This cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.descriptionWithoutArtist: This removes "{title}" from the playlist. This cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.descriptionFallback: This removes the selected request from the playlist. This cannot be undone.

queue.empty: No songs in the playlist yet.

relative.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
relative.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
relative.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

item.makeVipDisabledTooltip: Requires {requiredCount, plural, one {# VIP token} other {# VIP tokens}}, {requester} has {availableCount}.

actionsMenu.description: Choose whether to block the queued version, every version of this song, the artist, or a charter.
actionsMenu.blockVersionFallbackDescription: Blocks only the exact version attached to this request.
actionsMenu.blacklistSongGroup: Blacklist all versions of this song
actionsMenu.blockSongDescription: Blocks every version of this song.
actionsMenu.blockArtistDescription: Blocks every song by this artist.
actionsMenu.blockCharterDescription: Blocks every song by this charter.
actionsMenu.noCharterIds: No charter IDs available for these versions.

preview.removed: The demo row is removed from the playlist.
